scripts.preview: node scripts/with-cloudflare-env.mjs npm run cf:build && node scripts/with-cloudflare-env.mjs opennextjs-cloudflare preview
scripts.deploy: node scripts/with-cloudflare-env.mjs npm run cf:build && node scripts/with-cloudflare-env.mjs opennextjs-cloudflare deploy
scripts.upload: node scripts/with-cloudflare-env.mjs npm run cf:build && node scripts/with-cloudflare-env.mjs opennextjs-cloudflare upload
scripts.d1:migrate:local: node scripts/with-cloudflare-env.mjs wrangler d1 migrations apply mail_db --local
scripts.d1:migrate:remote: node scripts/with-cloudflare-env.mjs wrangler d1 migrations apply mail_db --remote
scripts.cf-typegen: node scripts/with-cloudflare-env.mjs wrangler types --env-interface CloudflareEnv cloudflare-env.d.ts
